title: Mediated mode without demonstrated mediation only detects
description: Item 9 soundness proof: a pre-exec mediated signal alone is a DECLARED control point, not proof SIR actually launched/proxied the process. Without provider_enforcement=real (no active runner, no capture proof) the kernel must NOT claim enforces — it degrades to detects. This is the false-enforces gap closed for mediated, the exact mirror of contained-provider-simulated. Same signal as mediated-sandbox-real; only the demonstrated-mediation proof differs.
